overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a desert highway shoulder in a video game (GTA V style). The scene features moderate traffic on a multi-lane highway with rocky hills and transmission towers on the left, and an elevated highway section on the right. Early morning lighting casts long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with transmission infrastructure

events.description: large truck passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder parallel to the highway, observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: semi-truck driving past on the highway heading in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large metal lattice electricity pylon towering over the left side of the shoulder
wooden utility pole on the far left edge of the frame
multi-lane asphalt highway with moderate vehicle traffic
rectangular metal signpost on the shoulder facing away from camera

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway shoulder with a large transmission tower dominating the left side. The camera walks forward along the dirt path as vehicles pass by on the highway to the right. A road sign appears on the left shoulder midway through, and the terrain ahead shows rocky outcrops in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder passing rocky terrain with elevated roadway

events.description: passing the large transmission tower as it moves behind the field of view
motorcycle overtakes the camera position on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as the landscape transitions from flat terrain to rocky outcrops

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the highway overtaking slower traffic

entered.detail: large rocky hill formation emerging on the left side of the shoulder
large advertising billboard visible in the distance above the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past the transmission tower and road sign, which exit the frame behind. A rocky outcrop becomes prominent on the left while the highway rises onto an embankment on the right. A billboard becomes visible in the distance, and various vehicles including a motorcycle pass by on the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside corridor with elevated highway overpass

events.description: slight curve in the path as the terrain narrows between rocky hillside and highway embankment

agents.ego_description: walking closer to the rocky hillside as the path narrows, with the billboard now clearly visible ahead

entered.detail: elevated highway structure extending into the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera walking between a rocky hillside on the left and an elevated highway overpass on the right. The billboard approaches closer in the center of the frame, and the terrain becomes more enclosed by the rocky outcrop now dominating the left side. Traffic continues to flow on the highway embankment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder that transitions from a landscape dominated by industrial infrastructure to one defined by rocky terrain and elevated roadways. It begins on a dirt path with a massive transmission tower looming on the left as vehicles stream past on the adjacent highway. As the camera moves forward, it passes a road sign on the shoulder while the distant horizon reveals jagged rocky outcrops. The scene then shifts as the transmission tower and sign recede behind the viewer, giving way to a prominent rock formation on the left and a rising highway embankment on the right. Finally, the perspective advances toward a distant billboard while a motorcycle and other cars flicker past in the early morning light.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a highway shoulder that becomes increasingly enclosed by a rugged landscape. It begins with the camera walking between a rocky hillside and an elevated highway overpass, while traffic flows steadily along the embankment. As the camera advances, a billboard in the center of the frame grows larger and more prominent. The scene then shifts as the rocky outcrop on the left expands to dominate the view, narrowing the perspective before the movement concludes.
